div1.entryFree: Shower, vb. to rain: evermore --ing? (i. e. weeping) Rom. III, 5, 131. == to fall down plenteously: it rained down fortune --ing on your head, H4A V, 1, 47. Trans. == to pour down plenteously: I s. a welcome on you; welcome all, H8 I, 4, 63. your royal graces --ed on me daily, III, 2, 167.
